name: @propifyos/bot-sdk-assemblyscript
description: AssemblyScript guest SDK for the PropifyOS bot sandbox (ABI v3 multi-candle window and account context).

scripts.build:debug: asc assembly/sample.ts --outFile build/sample.debug.wasm --textFile build/sample.debug.wat --runtime stub --use abort=assembly/noop/propifyAbort --debug
